description: From the Publisher Your First 840 Words in Arabic The One and Only Arabic Workbook Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 34 4.8 out of 5 stars 90 Price £14.73 £ 14 . 73 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 Recommended level For beginners (at best with some experience with the arabic alphabet) For complete beginners Focus Learn 840 words in 20 weeks Learn to read, write and pronounce the arabic alphabet Flashcards Includes 840 flashcards, one for each vocabulary word + an online learning app Includes online flashcards via a learning app so you can learn all the letters on the go
